lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re guramukh boojhai koe |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, one who becomes Gurmukh and understands this is very rare.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਸਦ ਭੈ ਰਚੈ ਆਪਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: satagur miliai sad bhai rachai aap vasai man aae |1|
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, one is permeated forever with the Fear of God, who Himself comes to dwell within the mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਤਿਨੀ ਸਾਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਬਿਨੁ ਚਾਖੇ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinee chaakhiaa tinee saad paaeaa bin chaakhe bharam bhulaae |
lines.english: Those who have tasted it, enjoy its flavor; without tasting it, they wander in doubt, lost and deceived.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਬੂਝੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਣੇ ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਖੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin boojhe karam kamaavane janam padaarath khoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: To act without understanding is to lose the treasure of this human life. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: amrit saachaa naam hai kahanaa kachhoo na jaae |
lines.english: The True Name is the Ambrosial Nectar; no one can describe it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀਵਤ ਹੂ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਭਇਆ ਪੂਰੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: peevat hoo paravaan bheaa poorai sabad samaae |2|
lines.english: Drinking it in, one becomes honorable, absorbed in the Perfect Word of the Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਤ ਪਾਈਐ ਹੋਰੁ ਕਰਣਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape dee ta paaeeai hor karanaa kichhoo na jaae |
lines.english: He Himself gives, and then we receive. Nothing else can be done.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਣ ਵਾਲੇ ਕੈ ਹਥਿ ਦਾਤਿ ਹੈ ਗੁਰੂ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: devan vaale kai hath daat hai guroo duaarai paae |
lines.english: The Gift is in the Hands of the Great Giver. At the Guru's Door, in the Gurdwara, it is received.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹਾ ਕੀਤੋਨੁ ਤੇਹਾ ਹੋਆ ਜੇਹੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jehaa keeton tehaa hoaa jehe karam kamaae |3|
lines.english: Whatever He does, comes to pass. All act according to His Will. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤੁ ਸਤੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jat sat sanjam naam hai vin naavai niramal na hoe |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is abstinence, truthfulness, and self-restraint. Without the Name, no one becomes pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜੇ ਹੀ ਰੰਗਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਪਾਵੈ ਸੋਇ ॥੪॥੧੭॥੫੦॥
lines.translit: naanak sahaje hee rang varatadaa har gun paavai soe |4|17|50|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who lives in intuitive peace and poise, imbued with the Lord's Love, obtains the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||4||17||50||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: poorai bhaag naam man vasai sabad milaavaa hoe |
lines.english: Through perfect good fortune, the Naam comes to abide within the mind. Through the Shabad, we merge into Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਂਇਆ ਸਾਧੈ ਉਰਧ ਤਪੁ ਕਰੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kaaneaa saadhai uradh tap karai vichahu haumai na jaae |
lines.english: You may torment your body with extremes of self-discipline, practice intensive meditation and hang upside-down, but your ego will not be eliminated from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਧਿਆਤਮ ਕਰਮ ਜੇ ਕਰੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਕਬ ਹੀ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: adhiaatam karam je kare naam na kab hee paae |
lines.english: You may perform religious rituals, and still never obtain the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਜੀਵਤੁ ਮਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad jeevat marai har naam vasai man aae |1|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, remain dead while yet alive, and the Name of the Lord shall come to dwell within the mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਬਿਖੁ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਗੁਰ ਤਰਣਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee chhutteeai bikh bhavajal sabad gur taranaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace you shall be saved. Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, you shall cross over the terrifying world-ocean of poison. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਜੁ ਸਤਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: sun man mere bhaj satagur saranaa |
lines.english: Listen, O my mind: hurry to the Protection of the Guru's Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤੁ ਪੜੈ ਬੰਧਨ ਮੋਹ ਬਾਧਾ ਨਹ ਬੂਝੈ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: panddit parrai bandhan moh baadhaa neh boojhai bikhiaa piaar |
lines.english: The Pandits, the religious scholars, read the scriptures, but they are trapped in the bondage of emotional attachment. In love with evil, they do not understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਸਭਾ ਧਾਤੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun sabhaa dhaat hai doojaa bhaau vikaar |
lines.english: Everything under the influence of the three qualities shall perish; the love of duality is corrupting.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਤ੍ਰਿਕੁਟੀ ਛੂਟੈ ਚਉਥੈ ਪਦਿ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: satagur miliai trikuttee chhoottai chauthai pad mukat duaar |2|
lines.english: Meeting the Guru, the bondage of the three qualities is cut away, and in the fourth state, the Door of Liberation is attained. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਚੂਕੈ ਮੋਹੁ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur te maarag paaeeai chookai mohu gubaar |
lines.english: Through the Guru, the Path is found, and the darkness of emotional attachment is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰੈ ਤਾ ਉਧਰੈ ਪਾਏ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabad marai taa udharai paae mokh duaar |
lines.english: If one dies through the Shabad, then salvation is obtained, and one finds the Door of Liberation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੈ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee mil rahai sach naam karataar |3|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one remains blended with the True Name of the Creator. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੂਆ ਅਤਿ ਸਬਲ ਹੈ ਛਡੇ ਨ ਕਿਤੈ ਉਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu manooaa at sabal hai chhadde na kitai upaae |
lines.english: This mind is very powerful; we cannot escape it just by trying.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਇਦਾ ਬਹੁਤੀ ਦੇਇ ਸਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae dukh laaeidaa bahutee dee sajaae |
lines.english: In the love of duality, people suffer in pain, condemned to terrible punishment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਗੇ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਗਵਾਇ ॥੪॥੧੮॥੫੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam lage se ubare haumai sabad gavaae |4|18|51|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are attached to the Naam are saved; through the Shabad, their ego is banished. ||4||18||51||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੋ ਦੇਇ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kirapaa kare gur paaeeai har naamo dee drirraae |
lines.english: By His Grace, the Guru is found, and the Name of the Lord is implanted within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur kinai na paaeo birathaa janam gavaae |
lines.english: Without the Guru, no one has obtained it; they waste away their lives in vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਚੁਕਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man re doojaa bhaau chukaae |
lines.english: O mind, give up the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: antar terai har vasai gur sevaa sukh paae | rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord dwells within you; serving the Guru, you shall find peace. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਣੇ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: manamukh karam kamaavane daragah milai sajaae |1|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs create karma, and in the Court of the Lord, they receive their punishment. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam man vasai haumai krodh nivaar |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord dwells within the mind; egotism and anger are wiped away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਚੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਹੈ ਜਾ ਸਚਿ ਧਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach baanee sach sabad hai jaa sach dhare piaar |
lines.english: When you love the Truth, your words are true; they reflect the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਤਾ ਪਾਏ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: man niramal naam dhiaaeeai taa paae mokh duaar |2|
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam with a pure mind, the Door of Liberation is found. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਜਗੁ ਬਿਨਸਦਾ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai vich jag binasadaa mar jamai aavai jaae |
lines.english: Engrossed in egotism, the world perishes. It dies and is re-born; it continues coming and going in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਨਾਉ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਚੇ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa naau paaeeai sache rahai samaae |3|
lines.english: Serving the Guru, the Name is obtained, and one remains absorbed in the True Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਜਾਸਨਿ ਪਤਿ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh sabad na jaananee jaasan pat gavaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do not recognize the Shabad; they forfeit their honor, and depart in disgrace.
